response: {"severity":"high","component":"checkout page","summary":"Checkout page fails on Chrome 121 for Windows 11: after entering card info and clicking pay, spinner runs for 30 seconds then white screen with no error message, plus console logs CORS error and undefined is not a function in checkout.bundle.js:847","steps_to_reproduce":["Add items to the shopping cart","Navigate to the checkout page","Enter credit card information","Click the pay button"],"expected_behavior":"Checkout process should complete successfully or display a clear error message without a blank white screen","actual_behavior":"After clicking pay, a spinner displays for 30 seconds followed by a white screen, no error message is shown to the user, and browser console logs a CORS error and \"undefined is not a function\" in checkout.bundle.js:847","environment":{"os":"Windows 11","browser":"Chrome 121"}}
